---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Layne Walter"
date: "2026-04-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(rvest)
library(readr)
library(robotstxt)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
url1<- "https://www.fangraphs.com/leaders/war?season=2025"
paths_allowed(paths="https://www.fangraphs.com/leaders/war?season=2025")

page2 <- read_html(url1)
```

```{r}
fangraphs <- page2 |> 
  html_elements("#root-war-leaders > div.leaders-war__data__wrapper > div > div.fg-data-grid.table-type > div.table-wrapper-outer > div > div.table-scroll > table") |> 
  html_table(header = TRUE)

players <- as.list(fangraphs[[1]][["Name"]])
total_WAR <- as.list(fangraphs[[1]][["Total WAR"]])


df <- data.frame(
  Player = fangraphs[[1]][["Name"]],
  total_WAR = fangraphs[[1]][["Total WAR"]]
)
```
